# CollegeDelhi — India's AI-Powered College Discovery Portal for Delhi NCR

> CollegeDelhi (collegedelhi.com) is a college admission portal for Delhi NCR, covering engineering, MBA, medical, law, arts, and design streams. We provide fees, NAAC grades, NIRF rankings, and AI-powered college matching for students seeking admission in Delhi NCR in 2026.

## Core college discovery pages

- [Best Engineering Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/engineering-colleges-delhi): IIT Delhi, DTU, NSUT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi — JEE Main cutoffs, fees, and placements
- [Best MBA Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/mba-colleges-delhi): FMS Delhi (~₹55K total fees, CAT-based admission), MDI Gurgaon, IMI Delhi, FORE, LBSIM
- [Best Medical Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/medical-colleges-delhi): AIIMS Delhi (NIRF #1 Medical), Vardhman Mahavir Medical College, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences — NEET UG admission
- [Best Law Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/law-colleges-delhi): NLU Delhi (AILET), DU Faculty of Law, Jamia Law — admission routes and fees
- [Best BCA Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/bca-colleges-delhi): IP University and Delhi-area BCA programs — fees and admission
- [Architecture & Design Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/design-colleges-delhi): School of Planning and Architecture, New Delhi (SPA Delhi) — NATA/JEE Paper 2 admission
- [Best Government Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/government-colleges-delhi): DTU, NSUT, IIT Delhi, Miranda House, Hindu College, SRCC, NLU Delhi, FMS Delhi — government fee structures

## Stream-specific pages

- [BA Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/ba-colleges-delhi): Miranda House, Lady Shri Ram College (LSR), Hindu College — CUET-based admission
- [Commerce Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/commerce-colleges-delhi): Shri Ram College of Commerce (SRCC), Hindu College, Sri Venkateswara College
- [LLB Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/llb-colleges-delhi): NLU Delhi (AILET), DU Faculty of Law / Campus Law Centre, Jamia Law
- [MBBS Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/mbbs-colleges-delhi): AIIMS Delhi, Vardhman Mahavir Medical College, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences — NEET UG admission

## Entrance exam guides

- [CUET Colleges Delhi](https://www.collegedelhi.com/cuet-colleges-delhi): Which Delhi colleges admit via CUET
- [JEE Colleges Delhi](https://www.collegedelhi.com/jee-colleges-delhi): JEE Main cutoffs and JAC Delhi counselling for DTU, NSUT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi
- [NEET Colleges Delhi](https://www.collegedelhi.com/neet-colleges-delhi): NEET UG admission for AIIMS Delhi, Vardhman Mahavir Medical College, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences

## Free tools

- [AI College Finder](https://www.collegedelhi.com/ai-finder): AI-powered college matching by stream, budget, exam score
- [College Predictor](https://www.collegedelhi.com/predictor): Enter JEE/NEET/CAT score and get matched colleges
- [College Comparator](https://www.collegedelhi.com/compare): Side-by-side fees, placements, NAAC grade comparison
- [ROI Calculator](https://www.collegedelhi.com/roi-calculator): Calculate 10-year earnings vs total college investment
- [NIRF Insights](https://www.collegedelhi.com/nirf-insights): Delhi colleges ranked by NIRF with NAAC grades
- [Cutoffs 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/cutoffs): JEE Main, NEET, CAT cutoffs for Delhi colleges

## Key facts about Delhi colleges

- Top government engineering colleges: IIT Delhi (NIRF #2 Engineering), DTU (NIRF #49), NSUT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi
- FMS Delhi (Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi) is widely cited as India's best-value MBA, with total fees of approximately ₹55,000 and strong placement outcomes — it has no connection to Symbiosis
- AIIMS Delhi is India's top-ranked medical institution (NIRF #1 Medical), with MBBS course fees of approximately ₹1,628–₹50,000 total
- Top University of Delhi constituent colleges: Miranda House, Lady Shri Ram College (LSR), Hindu College, Shri Ram College of Commerce (SRCC)
- NLU Delhi admits its flagship law program via AILET, a separate exam from CLAT used by most other National Law Universities

## About CollegeDelhi

- Website: https://www.collegedelhi.com
- Coverage: Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Greater Noida (Delhi NCR)
- Contact: support@collegedelhi.com
- Data policy: College data is cross-checked against official sources where possible; always verify current-year fees and cutoffs on the official institution portal before making admission decisions
